questionHtml: On another journey up the slope, the girl carries an additional mass. Explain whether carrying this mass will change the maximum distance that the bicycle can travel along the slope.
markschemeHtml:
«maximum» distance will decrease OWTTE ✔

because opposing/resistive force has increased
OR
because more energy is transferred to GPE
OR
because velocity has decreased
OR
increased mass means more work required «to move up the hill» ✔

meta.title: On another journey up the slope, the girl carries an additional mass. Explain whether carrying this mass will change the maximum distance that the bicycle can travel along the slop
